user_query: how many invoices are there with suppliers polydono and approver mac master
family_description: Count invoices or check invoice volume — by supplier, creator, date, PO number, amount threshold, channel, or status. Covers 'how many invoices from supplier X', 'how many invoices created this month', 'how many invoices for PO 1696', 'total number of invoices', 'how many open/new invoices', 'aged invoices', 'invoices created via CSP', 'status distribution'.
